connection_params.name: cmms_graphql_url
connection_params.description: CMMS GraphQL endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:3000/graphql). Primary data source for work orders, assets, maintenance requests.

connection_params.name: cmms_rest_url
connection_params.description: CMMS REST API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:3000/api). Secondary source for kits, vendors, locations.

connection_params.name: rabbitmq_url
connection_params.description: RabbitMQ AMQP URL (e.g. amqp://guest:guest@localhost:5672). Optional — required for subscription to ERPI master data (item, vendor).

connection_params.name: jwt_token
connection_params.description: JWT bearer token for authenticated GraphQL/REST requests.

connection_params.name: rabbitmq_consumer_group
connection_params.description: Consumer group ID for RabbitMQ queue naming. Must be unique to Forge.

connection_params.name: poll_interval_seconds
connection_params.description: GraphQL polling interval for work orders, assets, maintenance requests (10-3600 seconds).
